texto: Fundamentally, if you look at where the environmental issues are coming from, it's all because of humans and our impact on the environment, so while it's true that one individual is not going to sufficiently fix the environment, it is a necessary thing.
explicacao: Citação de David Filo sobre temas ligados a saude mental. “Fundamentally, if you look at where the environmental issues are coming from, it's all because of…” articula saude-mental, impact, environment em registro de saude mental, com relevância para contextos como environment e you.
